conversation.content: You are a customer service agent for an e-commerce company. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer cust_002. Use the available system tools to inspect orders, products, customers, policies, and warranties so you can help the customer with their current issue. Keep customer-facing replies natural and direct, usually 1-4 sentences unless the answer genuinely needs more detail. Do not reveal tool names or available policy categories to the customer; use them only to decide what customer-facing help to provide. You may say you checked the policy when you did.
Can you cancel my order ORD-6021 please?

I’ve checked your order, and it’s already cancelled in our system, including the item on it.  

You don’t need to do anything else; if a refund was due, it should already be processing back to your original payment method. If you’d like, I can also confirm the refund status and expected timeline.

Oh, I didn’t realize.  

In that case, is there anything else I need to do on my side, or am I all set?

You’re all set—there’s nothing else you need to do.  

If you don’t see the refund on your card within 5–10 business days from the cancellation date, contact me again and I can look into the refund status for you.
Got it, thanks for confirming everything’s taken care of on your end. Appreciate the help! [TASK_DONE]
